steps: From repo root run: rg -n "DiscardWords|AllowWords" src/components/editor
Confirm the command exits 1 with zero matches (grep / rg returns 1 when no match).
Confirm no JSX usage of those components remains in src/components/editor/EditorView.tsx.
Run pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 120.
Confirm launch_status=launched_ok.
Open a project in the editor view; confirm there is no SettingsGroup titled 'Words' / DiscardWords / AllowWords block in the editor.
Confirm browser console (DevTools) reports no missing-import or undefined-component errors.
Launch via pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 120.
Open Settings; confirm an 'Advanced' entry is visible in the navigation.
Click Advanced; confirm both DiscardWords and AllowWords components render with their input field, Add button, and existing word chips.
Add a new word to each list and confirm it appears in the chip row without errors.
Launch and add a unique sentinel word (e.g. PMVERIFY42) to the Allow list under Settings -> Advanced.
Quit the app cleanly.
Re-launch via pwsh scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1 -ObservationSeconds 60.
Open Settings -> Advanced; confirm PMVERIFY42 is still present in the Allow chip row.
Repeat for the Discard list with PMVERIFY43.
Launch and open Settings -> Post-processing then Settings -> Advanced.
Confirm both pages use visually identical SettingsGroup chrome (same heading typography, spacing, divider style).
Open src/i18n/locales/en/translation.json.
Confirm settings.advanced.title is a non-empty human-readable English string (e.g. Advanced).
Confirm settings.advanced.description is a non-empty one-line English description.
Confirm AGENTS.md Settings UI contract (label + description) is satisfied for every new key.
Open features/advanced-menu-restoration/journal.md.
Confirm an Audit section exists with a one-paragraph heuristic.
Confirm the table covers every .tsx file under src/components/settings/ (excluding experimental/ and debug/).
Confirm each row has Component / Setting key / Recommended placement / Rationale columns filled in.
Confirm docs/settings-placement.md exists and is tracked in git.
Confirm it states the heuristic in user-readable language.
Confirm it links to features/advanced-menu-restoration/journal.md as the source-of-truth audit table.
